question: What is the total number of days I spent in Japan and Chicago?
ground_truth_answer: 11 days (or 12 days, if April 15th to 22nd is considered as 8 days)

retrieval_results.context:
The user visited Japan from April 15 to April 22
The user visited Chicago in March and walked along the Lake Michigan shoreline
The user plans to stay at The Wit Hotel in Chicago
The user will visit Millennium Park during the upcoming Chicago trip
